metadata.title: OpenConfig
metadata.description: PAN-OS expands its automation capabilities to now support a management interface based on the OpenConfig standard data models to simplify deploying firewalls in OpenConfig managed networks. The OpenConfig gNMI/gNOI service is provided through the OpenConfig plugin.
metadata.keywords: 1.0, Strata, 1.1, Next-Generation Firewall, OpenConfig, PANW Yellow Theme, PAN-OS, Network Security, Plugins, 1.2, 1.3

metadata.title: Manage Local Routes
metadata.description:
Examples of managing local routes with OpenConfig on
		PAN-OS firewalls.
metadata.keywords: 1.0, Strata, Next-Generation Firewall, OpenConfig, PAN-OS OpenConfig Administrator’s Guide, Static Routes, Non-Cloud, PANW Yellow Theme, PAN-OS, Network Security

		PAN-OS.

metadata.description:
Examples of managing local routes with OpenConfig on
		PAN-OS firewalls.

plugin.
